content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

The amendment fixes a real section-extraction defect: H1 `Non-goals` and `Acceptance Criteria` headings are currently ignored in `project_run_record`, which can misclassify bead description content and produce an incorrect prompt.

## Votes

- `fr-13-f33a9676`: Accept
  `src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs` currently returns `None` for markdown headings when `hash_count < 2`, so `section_kind_for_bead_description_line()` never recognizes valid H1 forms like `# Non-goals` or `# Acceptance Criteria`. As a result, those sections remain in `Must-Do Scope`, and description-only acceptance criteria can be lost in favor of the default fallback text. Expanding this parser to accept H1-H6 is correct, aligns with normal markdown expectations and the more complete heading parser already present in `src/cli/project.rs`, and a regression test for H1 section extraction is warranted.
